subject: [CLAMP] use common templates for logs
commit_message:
[CLAMP] use common templates for logs

Using the common templates for centralized logging.

Issue-ID: OOM-2370
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I4824e11bd2be971d15e3a39510f544d2c36b05fd

entries.message:

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

looks fine from a clamp perspective

DCAE error occurs on other patches and is not linked to the patch

@Christophe/Sébastien/Gervais would it be possible to add a specific Clamp test in the CI chain in addition of the healthcheck. https://gating-results.onap.eu/results/onap_daily_pod4_master-526989007-04-26-2020_07-04/

Or do you think that the healthcheck is enough?
It shall be possible to reuse some CSIT/functional tests no?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

When the clamp healthCheck is queried, it validates the frontend and the backend at the same time.
SO it looks fine.
Change has been successfully merged by Krzysztof Opasiak
